---
name: Feature Suggestion
about: Suggest a feature based on community feedback
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, community
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Request Summary
<!-- Brief description of the requested feature -->


## User Story
<!-- Who wants this and why? -->
**As a** [type of user]  
**I want** [feature/capability]  
**So that** [benefit/outcome]

## Community Demand
<!-- How many users are asking for this? -->
- [ ] Single user request
- [ ] Multiple users (2-5)
- [ ] Recurring request (6-10)
- [ ] High demand (10+ requests)

## User Quotes
<!-- Include actual user quotes requesting this feature (anonymize if needed) -->
```
[Paste user quote here]
```

## Philosophy Check
<!-- Does this feature align with our 11 commandments? -->

**✅ Green Light (Build It):**
- [ ] Makes WordPress management easier for everyone
- [ ] Can be done well in free tier (local or generous cloud)
- [ ] Creates educational opportunity (KB/training links)
- [ ] Delivers measurable KPI improvement
- [ ] Builds confidence/trust (transparency, intuitive)
- [ ] Talk-worthy (users would share)

**⚠️ Yellow Light (Proceed with Caution):**
- [ ] Requires infrastructure (must have generous free tier first)
- [ ] Complex UI (must be exceptionally intuitive)
- [ ] Collects data (must be consent-first, transparent)
- [ ] Could feel salesy (rework all copy with "helpful neighbor" lens)

**🛑 Red Light (Don't Build):**
- [ ] Creates dependency instead of empowerment
- [ ] Requires payment for basic functionality
- [ ] Hides information behind upsells
- [ ] Feels manipulative or sales-driven
- [ ] Collects data without clear user benefit
- [ ] "Enterprise only" or "Contact sales" features

## Proposed Solution (Optional)
<!-- If users suggested how it should work, describe it here -->


## Expected Impact
<!-- What would this feature accomplish? -->
- **User benefit:** 
- **Community impact:** 
- **Business value:** 

## Priority (Your Assessment)
<!-- Based on community demand and impact -->
- [ ] Critical (would solve major pain point)
- [ ] High (frequently requested, clear benefit)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have, good impact)
- [ ] Low (edge case, minor benefit)

## Similar Features
<!-- Do other WordPress tools have this? How do they do it? -->

<!-- Any other relevant information -->
